name: What should an AI SEO strategy actually measure?
description: Measure source visibility, summarized-answer visibility, mention frequency, referral traffic, and conversions. Also track how quickly you can correct inaccurate

mainEntity.name: What should an AI SEO strategy actually measure?

acceptedAnswer.text: A useful AI SEO strategy should answer whether your brand appears as a source, whether it shows up in the summarized answer, how often it is mentioned, and whether those mentions lead to visits or conversions. It should also include a plan for fixing inaccurate AI outputs.
acceptedAnswer.description: Measure source visibility, summarized-answer visibility, mention frequency, referral traffic, and conversions. Also track how quickly you can correct inaccurate AI outputs.
